name: Orange-Chocolate Chippers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and cheese until smooth.
2. Add sugars; mix well.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in orange peel and vanilla.
4. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with egg mixture, mixing just enough to combine.
5. Fold in chocolate chips.
6. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
7. If desired, sprinkle cookies lightly with nuts or granulated sugar.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, until edges are set and the centers are slightly puffed.
9. Cool on wire racks before serving.
Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
